summary: Excellent soundboard capture featuring a grin‑inducing performance of “The Race Is On”.
review: The reviewer praises the recording’s quality, calling it clear and enjoyable, and highlights the Dead’s rendition of George Jones’ “The Race Is On” as a standout moment that made them smile. With no noted flaws in either performance or audio, this short set is presented as a high‑quality listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review, which praises both the show and recording; rating reflects strong positive feedback but limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes love of the quality; no issues mentioned, indicating a clear, well‑balanced capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; only the highlighted song is noted as a highlight.
